TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Danny Aiello kawas tay 1933, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 6, Danny Aiello, squliq na Bunge'. qnxan na raral Danny Aiello ga te magal laqi ru htgan beh West 68th Street, Manhattan .hiya yaba ru yaya gzyaw qaya pincyogan nya.cingay kawas lga,Aiello ini smoya hiya yaba.suruw lga,1993 kawas psblaq sazing nha la. Aiello cyux Itali lamu,hiya 7 kawas,musa maki South Bronx ,mqwas beh James Monroe pqwasan biru. 16 kawas, Aiello kbrus kawas nya,hetay pincyogan.maki hetay pincyogan cyugal kawas,suruw lga,musa New York rogal,cingay zyaw mlaghang nya. 1960 kawas,Aiello ga te 1202 mrhuw maki Amalgamated Transit Union na Greyhound Bus pincyogan nya.hiya mlahang The Improv hlahuy maki New York. 1980 kawas,hiya smoya musa Café Central,krryax na llpyung,cingay squilq musa uzi, maki 79th Street ru Amsterdam Avenue, in Manhattan ru Columbus nniqan maki 66th Street ru Columbus Avenue . pincyogan nya 1970 kawas, Aiello te qutux tmwang ega'.raral ga,hiya ru Robert De Niro msqun mhtuw 1973 kawas" Bang the Drum Slowly". 1974 kawas,Aiello mtbah squilq psibay mhtuw Tony Rosato. 1980 kawas,Aiello ru Jan-Michael Vincen msqun mhtuw maki Defiance. 1981 kawas,Aiello mhtuw ABC Family of Strangers "陌生人家庭"wal magal blaq sqabu. 1984 kawas,Aiello txali ru Jan-Michael Vincen mhtuw Sergio Leone "美國往事"mkinsat mrhuw,lalu Aiello uzi. hngyang qwas qwas nya ga mhtuw beh ega',laqi ga syungaw yaba nya mzyugi ru mqwas. qyanux nya bsyaq bsyaq balay mqyanux Ramsey, New Jersey qani.musa maki binah Saddle River, New Jersey la.mhuqli 2010 kawas,wal rasun yaqah na gang. 2014 kawas,Aiello miru biru magal Simon ru Schuster. hiya laqi ga sakas ru squilq msibay 丹尼·艾洛三世, 丹尼·艾洛三世 wal mhuqil yaqeh nbu 2010 kawas.sinbilan cinbwanan laqi Rick ,Jaime ru Stacey Aiello nya. hiya suna ga squilq ptkeke'/prapa kmal maki New York Yankees/tmucing mari cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: *annj aiello kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *annj aiello, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. qnxan na raral *annj aiello ɣa te maɣal laqi ru ħtɣan βeħ wes~ɕt **tħ s~ɕtreet, manħattan .ħija jaβa ru jaja ɣzjaw qaja pinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja.ʦ~ʨiŋaj kawas~ɕ lɣa,aiello ini s~ɕmoja ħija jaβa.s~ɕuruw lɣa,**** kawas~ɕ ps~ɕβlaq s~ɕaziŋ nħa la. aiello ʦ~ʨjux itali lamu,ħija * kawas~ɕ,mus~ɕa maki s~ɕoutħ βronx ,mqwas~ɕ βeħ *ames~ɕ monroe pqwas~ɕan βiru. ** kawas~ɕ, aiello kβrus~ɕ kawas~ɕ nja,ħetaj pinʦ~ʨjoɣan.maki ħetaj pinʦ~ʨjoɣan ʦ~ʨjuɣal kawas~ɕ,s~ɕuruw lɣa,mus~ɕa new jork roɣal,ʦ~ʨiŋaj zjaw mlaɣħaŋ nja. **** kawas~ɕ,aiello ɣa te **** mrħuw maki amalɣamate* trans~ɕit union na ɣrejħoun* βus~ɕ pinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja.ħija mlaħaŋ tħe impro* ħlaħuj maki new jork. **** kawas~ɕ,ħija s~ɕmoja mus~ɕa ʦ~ʨa** ʦ~ʨentral,krrjax na llpjuŋ,ʦ~ʨiŋaj s~ɕquilq mus~ɕa uzi, maki **tħ s~ɕtreet ru ams~ɕter*am a*enue, in manħattan ru ʦ~ʨolumβus~ɕ nniqan maki **tħ s~ɕtreet ru ʦ~ʨolumβus~ɕ a*enue . pinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja **** kawas~ɕ, aiello te qutux tmwaŋ eɣaʔ.raral ɣa,ħija ru roβert *e niro ms~ɕqun mħtuw **** kawas~ɕ" βaŋ tħe *rum s~ɕlowlj". **** kawas~ɕ,aiello mtβaħ s~ɕquilq ps~ɕiβaj mħtuw tonj ros~ɕato. **** kawas~ɕ,aiello ru *an-miʦ~ʨħael *inʦ~ʨen ms~ɕqun mħtuw maki *e*ianʦ~ʨe. **** kawas~ɕ,aiello mħtuw aβʦ~ʨ *amilj o* s~ɕtraŋers~ɕ "*****"wal maɣal βlaq s~ɕqaβu. **** kawas~ɕ,aiello txali ru *an-miʦ~ʨħael *inʦ~ʨen mħtuw s~ɕerɣio leone "****"mkins~ɕat mrħuw,lalu aiello uzi. ħŋjaŋ qwas~ɕ qwas~ɕ nja ɣa mħtuw βeħ eɣaʔ,laqi ɣa s~ɕjuŋaw jaβa nja mzjuɣi ru mqwas~ɕ. qjanux nja βs~ɕjaq βs~ɕjaq βalaj mqjanux rams~ɕej, new *ers~ɕej qani.mus~ɕa maki βinaħ s~ɕa**le ri*er, new *ers~ɕej la.mħuqli **** kawas~ɕ,wal ras~ɕun jaqaħ na ɣaŋ. **** kawas~ɕ,aiello miru βiru maɣal s~ɕimon ru s~ɕʦ~ʨħus~ɕter. ħija laqi ɣa s~ɕakas~ɕ ru s~ɕquilq ms~ɕiβaj *******, ******* wal mħuqil jaqeħ nβu **** kawas~ɕ.s~ɕinβilan ʦ~ʨinβwanan laqi riʦ~ʨk ,*aime ru s~ɕtaʦ~ʨej aiello nja. ħija s~ɕuna ɣa s~ɕquilq ptkekeʔ/prapa kmal maki new jork jankees~ɕ/tmuʦ~ʨiŋ mari ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
S.FORM: Danny Aiello kawas tay 1933, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 6, Danny Aiello, squliq na Bunge'. qnxan na raral Danny Aiello ga te magal laqi ru htgan beh West 68th Street, Manhattan .hiya yaba ru yaya gzyaw qaya pincyogan nya.cingay kawas lga,Aiello ini smoya hiya yaba.suruw lga,1993 kawas psblaq sazing nha la. Aiello cyux Itali lamu,hiya 7 kawas,musa maki South Bronx ,mqwas beh James Monroe pqwasan biru. 16 kawas, Aiello kbrus kawas nya,hetay pincyogan.maki hetay pincyogan cyugal kawas,suruw lga,musa New York rogal,cingay zyaw mlaghang nya. 1960 kawas,Aiello ga te 1202 mrhuw maki Amalgamated Transit Union na Greyhound Bus pincyogan nya.hiya mlahang The Improv hlahuy maki New York. 1980 kawas,hiya smoya musa Café Central,krryax na llpyung,cingay squilq musa uzi, maki 79th Street ru Amsterdam Avenue, in Manhattan ru Columbus nniqan maki 66th Street ru Columbus Avenue . pincyogan nya 1970 kawas, Aiello te qutux tmwang ega'.raral ga,hiya ru Robert De Niro msqun mhtuw 1973 kawas" Bang the Drum Slowly". 1974 kawas,Aiello mtbah squilq psibay mhtuw Tony Rosato. 1980 kawas,Aiello ru Jan-Michael Vincen msqun mhtuw maki Defiance. 1981 kawas,Aiello mhtuw ABC Family of Strangers "陌生人家庭"wal magal blaq sqabu. 1984 kawas,Aiello txali ru Jan-Michael Vincen mhtuw Sergio Leone "美國往事"mkinsat mrhuw,lalu Aiello uzi. hngyang qwas qwas nya ga mhtuw beh ega',laqi ga syungaw yaba nya mzyugi ru mqwas. qyanux nya bsyaq bsyaq balay mqyanux Ramsey, New Jersey qani.musa maki binah Saddle River, New Jersey la.mhuqli 2010 kawas,wal rasun yaqah na gang. 2014 kawas,Aiello miru biru magal Simon ru Schuster. hiya laqi ga sakas ru squilq msibay 丹尼·艾洛三世, 丹尼·艾洛三世 wal mhuqil yaqeh nbu 2010 kawas.sinbilan cinbwanan laqi Rick ,Jaime ru Stacey Aiello nya. hiya suna ga squilq ptkeke'/prapa kmal maki New York Yankees/tmucing mari cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors

ru jaja ɣzjaw qaja pinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja.ʦ~ʨiŋaj kawas~ɕ lɣa,aiello ini s~ɕmoja ħija jaβa.s~ɕuruw lɣa,**** kawas~ɕ ps~ɕβlaq s~ɕaziŋ nħa la. aiello ʦ~ʨjux itali lamu,ħija * kawas~ɕ,mus~ɕa maki s~ɕoutħ βronx ,mqwas~ɕ βeħ *ames~ɕ monroe pqwas~ɕan βiru. ** kawas~ɕ, aiello kβrus~ɕ kawas~ɕ nja,ħetaj pinʦ~ʨjoɣan.maki ħetaj pinʦ~ʨjoɣan ʦ~ʨjuɣal kawas~ɕ,s~ɕuruw lɣa,mus~ɕa new jork roɣal,ʦ~ʨiŋaj zjaw mlaɣħaŋ nja. **** kawas~ɕ,aiello ɣa te **** mrħuw maki amalɣamate* trans~ɕit union na ɣrejħoun* βus~ɕ pinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja.ħija mlaħaŋ tħe impro* ħlaħuj maki new jork. **** kawas~ɕ,ħija s~ɕmoja mus~ɕa ʦ~ʨa** ʦ~ʨentral,krrjax na llpjuŋ,ʦ~ʨiŋaj s~ɕquilq mus~ɕa uzi, maki **tħ s~ɕtreet ru ams~ɕter*am a*enue, in manħattan ru ʦ~ʨolumβus~ɕ nniqan maki **tħ s~ɕtreet ru ʦ~ʨolumβus~ɕ a*enue . pinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja **** kawas~ɕ, aiello te qutux tmwaŋ eɣaʔ.raral ɣa,ħija ru roβert *e niro ms~ɕqun mħtuw **** kawas~ɕ" βaŋ tħe *rum s~ɕlowlj". **** kawas~ɕ,aiello mtβaħ s~ɕquilq ps~ɕiβaj mħtuw tonj ros~ɕato. **** kawas~ɕ,aiello ru *an-miʦ~ʨħael *inʦ~ʨen ms~ɕqun mħtuw maki *e*ianʦ~ʨe. **** kawas~ɕ,aiello mħtuw aβʦ~ʨ *amilj o* s~ɕtraŋers~ɕ "*****"wal maɣal βlaq s~ɕqaβu. **** kawas~ɕ,aiello txali ru *an-miʦ~ʨħael *inʦ~ʨen mħtuw s~ɕerɣio leone "****"mkins~ɕat mrħuw,lalu aiello uzi. ħŋjaŋ qwas~ɕ qwas~ɕ nja ɣa mħtuw βeħ eɣaʔ,laqi ɣa s~ɕjuŋaw jaβa nja mzjuɣi ru mqwas~ɕ. qjanux nja βs~ɕjaq βs~ɕjaq βalaj mqjanux rams~ɕej, new *ers~ɕej qani.mus~ɕa maki βinaħ s~ɕa**le ri*er, new *ers~ɕej la.mħuqli **** kawas~ɕ,wal ras~ɕun jaqaħ na ɣaŋ. **** kawas~ɕ,aiello miru βiru maɣal s~ɕimon ru s~ɕʦ~ʨħus~ɕter. ħija laqi ɣa s~ɕakas~ɕ ru s~ɕquilq ms~ɕiβaj *******, ******* wal mħuqil jaqeħ nβu **** kawas~ɕ.s~ɕinβilan ʦ~ʨinβwanan laqi riʦ~ʨk ,*aime ru s~ɕtaʦ~ʨej aiello nja. ħija s~ɕuna ɣa s~ɕquilq ptkekeʔ/prapa kmal maki new jork jankees~ɕ/tmuʦ~ʨiŋ mari ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
